name: opplevagent-mcp
description: MCP server for discovering Norwegian local experiences and activities via Opplevagent — search, info, categories.
long_description:
Opplevagent connects you to a curated, Brreg-verified marketplace of Norwegian experiences and activities. Search by county (fylke), category, weather, season, indoor/outdoor, group size, age, price, and duration. Every result includes location, description, and a booking URL where available.

Examples:
- "hva kan vi finne på i Troms om vinteren?"
- "utendørsaktiviteter i Oslo for 4 personer"
- "opplevelser som passer i regnvær i Bergen"
- "familievennlige aktiviteter under 500 kr"
_source_note: opplevagent-mcp is published from the mcp-server-opplevagent/ subfolder of this same slookisen/lokal repo (see mcp-server-opplevagent/package.json and server.json), not from a separate slookisen/opplevagent-mcp repo. repository.url and support above were corrected to match the verified in-repo source rather than the initially assumed separate-repo URL.

tools.name: discover_experiences
tools.description: Search the opplevagent.no curated marketplace of Norwegian experiences by county (fylke), category, weather, season, indoor/outdoor, group size, age, price, and duration. Returns title, category, location, description, and booking URL.

tools.name: list_experience_categories
tools.description: List all available experience categories on opplevagent.no along with the number of verified experiences in each category.

tools.name: get_experience
tools.description: Fetch complete details for a single experience by its UUID — full description, location, indoor/outdoor, season, weather suitability, group size/age limits, price, duration, languages, and booking URL.
